cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab
cards.prompt: The single value $f_{avg} = \frac{1}{b-a}\int_a^b f(x)\,dx$ that represents the 'average height' of $f$ on $[a, b]$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab

cards.subject: ap-calculus-ab
